questions.question: What is Monkey D. Luffy's ultimate dream?
options: To become the King of the Pirates
questions.explanation: Luffy wants to find Gold Roger's legendary treasure, the One Piece, to become the King of the Pirates and the freest person on the sea.

questions.question: Which Devil Fruit did Luffy eat as a child, turning him into a rubber man?
questions.explanation: Luffy ate the Gum-Gum Fruit (Gomu Gomu no Mi), giving him the properties of rubber.

questions.question: Who was the first member to join Monkey D. Luffy's Straw Hat crew?
questions.explanation: Roronoa Zoro, the pirate hunter and master of the Three-Sword Style, is the first recruit of the Straw Hat Pirates.

questions.question: What was the name of the Straw Hat crew's first official pirate ship?
questions.explanation: The Going Merry was gifted to the crew by Kaya and served as their beloved home until the Water 7/Enies Lobby arc.

questions.question: Who is Luffy's adoptive brother who ate the Flame-Flame Fruit (Mera Mera no Mi)?
questions.explanation: Portgas D. Ace is Luffy's older adoptive brother and commander of the Whitebeard Pirates' second division.
